name: Value Pawn & Jewelry
description_short: Value Pawn & Jewelry is a pawn shop in Miami offering collateral-based loans, gold/jewelry buying, and discounted pre-owned merchandise across electronics, tools, fashion, and accessories.
description_long:
Value Pawn & Jewelry operates as a traditional pawn shop located at 736 NW 183rd Street in Miami, Florida. The business functions as part of the broader EZPAWN family of stores, offering pawn loans secured by personal items in working condition. The company has positioned itself as a community-focused alternative financial service provider in the Miami area.

The company's primary services include pawn loans (secured short-term lending against collateral), gold and diamond jewelry buying at competitive rates, retail sales of discounted pre-owned merchandise (25-70% off retail), layaway options with 10% down payments, and flexible third-party payment plans. They also offer an Instant Quote tool for electronics valuations, EZ+ Rewards Program enrollment, product protection plans, and specialized jewelry VIP protection programs. Additional services include auto loans and firearms sales, though availability varies by location.

Value Pawn & Jewelry differentiates itself through daily inventory turnover, an online shop with thousands of items, expert precious metals testing for fair pricing, and flexible payment options including layaway and extended payment plans (up to 12 months). The EZ+ Rewards Program allows customers to manage transactions online and earn points on eligible activities. Their store hours accommodate working customers (open 9 AM-7 PM weekdays, with weekend hours), and they actively promote tax refund maximization campaigns.

For consumers seeking quick cash against collateral, this pawn shop offers accessible lending without credit checks or income verification requirements. However, pawn loans involve forfeiture risk if items aren't redeemed, and the terms—including fees and interest rates—are not disclosed on the website. The retail merchandise consists entirely of pre-owned items, which may concern buyers seeking new goods. Like all pawn shops, this model works best for those with items of value and short-term liquidity needs rather than long-term financing solutions.
pros: No credit check required for pawn loans; based on item value rather than creditworthiness
Same-day cash available with instant quote tool for electronics valuations
Expert gold and diamond testing ensures fair pricing on precious metals
Wide product selection (electronics, jewelry, tools, gaming, sneakers, handbags) with daily new arrivals
Flexible payment options including layaway (10% down), extended payment plans up to 12 months, and EZ+ Rewards points
Store hours accommodate working people (weekdays until 7 PM, weekend availability)
Online shop and EZ+ mobile app allow remote transaction management and online payments
cons: Pawn loan terms, fees, and interest rates not disclosed on website; customers must visit in person or contact directly
Collateral forfeiture risk: failure to repay results in loss of pledged items
All retail inventory is pre-owned merchandise only; no new items available for purchase
Limited service availability: online payments not offered in Arizona, Oregon, or Pennsylvania; not all services available in all areas
No indication of licensing, regulatory compliance information, or consumer protections displayed on website
best_for: Consumers with items of value needing quick cash within days and willing to pledge collateral
Budget shoppers seeking significant discounts (25-70% off) on pre-owned electronics and brand-name merchandise
People with poor credit or no credit history unable to access traditional personal loans
Sellers of gold, diamonds, or jewelry who want expert testing and competitive buyout offers
diagnosis: Value Pawn & Jewelry is best for consumers with collateral (jewelry, electronics, tools) who need fast cash and either lack credit or prefer not to pursue traditional lending. The main caveat is that pawn loans carry forfeiture risk if not repaid, terms are non-transparent on their website, and the retail merchandise offering consists entirely of pre-owned items—making this unsuitable for customers seeking new products or long-term financing.
services: Pawn loans against collateral with same-day or next-day cash
Gold and diamond jewelry buying with expert precious metals testing
Retail sales of pre-owned electronics, jewelry, tools, gaming, fashion, and accessories
Layaway with 10% down and monthly payment options
Third-party flexible payment plans (up to 12 months, subject to credit eligibility)
Instant Quote tool for electronics valuations
EZ+ Rewards Program with points on pawn, redeem, sell, or purchase transactions
Product Protection Plans for electronics and merchandise
Jewelry VIP Program with guaranteed loan amounts, trade-up benefits, and free cleaning/repairs
Online shop with inventory browsing and purchases
